visible_goal: When Thomas opens https://www.mealscout.us/scout, all discoverable food trucks appear with honest status labels.
user_problem: Only 3D Eats appeared. Other trucks were missing, broader subscribed truck inventory collapsed, and trucks without exact profile coordinates were dropped before not-live/service-area rendering.
acceptance_criteria: Food Trucks count matches displayed truck cards
Missing menu does not hide a truck
Missing schedule does not hide a truck
Missing exact live location does not hide a truck if serving-area or city-level discoverability exists
No truck is falsely labeled live
files_or_areas_to_inspect: lat/lng, radius, active, verified, live, schedule, menu, location, serving-area, and profile visibility filters
forbidden_changes: Do not move product code into Round Table
